name: Morning Glory Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Position the rack in the upper third of the oven and preheat to 425°F.
2. Coat 12 muffin cups with non-stick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, stir together bran, flours, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Stir in raisins, dates, and dried apricots.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together buttermilk, molasses, apple butter, egg white, oil, lemon juice, lemon zest, and vanilla.
6. Stir the liquid mixture into the flour mixture just until the dry ingredients are moistened. Do not overmix.
7. Divide the batter among the prepared muffin cups. (They will be nearly full.)
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Turn the muffins out onto a rack and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
